shortDescription: Contemporary 1-bedroom apartment in Moss Park with designer finishes and vibrant neighbourhood.
fullDescription: Welcome to 88 Queen Street East, Unit 310 in the vibrant Moss Park neighbourhood. This contemporary apartment features a thoughtfully designed layout that maximises natural light. The main living area features gleaming hardwood floors and an abundance of natural light from oversized windows. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. Upstairs, 1 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. The deep lot provides ample space for gardening, play, or future expansion. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Renovated galley kitchen with breakfast bar
Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
